track_record.frame_line: Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metrics govern.
track_record.visibility_markdown:
## M-1 Outcomes

Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metric is excess CLV.
Outcome denominator basis: PA-valid settled player-market rows only; zero-PA and absent-boxscore rows are VOID.
Retroactive-grading note: CLV sign is rendered from captured closes where available; this is report visibility only.

### 2026-07-18 settlements

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 45 | 7 | 15.6% | 19.3% |
| Hits | 59 | 31 | 52.5% | 55.8% |
| HR | 41 | 5 | 12.2% | 15.6% |
| Total bases | 72 | 35 | 48.6% | 46.8% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=38/41 (92.7%); unmatched=3.

#### CLV-sign split

| Market | CLV bucket | Picks | Hits | Hit rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | negative/flat CLV | 24 | 4 | 16.7% |
| Doubles | positive CLV | 7 | 1 | 14.3% |
| Hits | negative/flat CLV | 33 | 16 | 48.5% |
| Hits | positive CLV | 13 | 7 | 53.8% |
| HR | negative/flat CLV | 20 | 1 | 5.0% |
| HR | positive CLV | 18 | 4 | 22.2% |
| Total bases | negative/flat CLV | 32 | 18 | 56.2% |
| Total bases | positive CLV | 18 | 8 | 44.4% |

Positive-CLV-and-hit names: Dillon Dingler — Doubles 0.5 @ BetMGM; Andruw Monasterio — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Austin Riley — Hits 0.5 @ Bally Bet; Bryce Eldridge — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Garrett Mitchell — Hits 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Jorge Soler — Hits 0.5 @ BetMGM; Kody Clemens — Hits 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Willy Adames — Hits 0.5 @ DraftKings; Rafael Devers — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Salvador Perez — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Tyler Soderstrom — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Willy Adames — HR 0.5 @ betPARX; Andruw Monasterio — Total bases 0.5 @ Fanatics; Dansby Swanson — Total bases 1.5 @ Hard Rock Bet; Garrett Mitchell — Total bases 0.5 @ Hard Rock Bet (OH); Garrett Mitchell — Total bases 1.5 @ Hard Rock Bet; Jorge Soler — Total bases 0.5 @ BetMGM; Rafael Devers — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet; Seiya Suzuki — Total bases 1.5 @ Bovada; William Contreras — Total bases 1.5 @ Bally Bet.

### Cumulative M-1 outcomes through 2026-07-18

## Coverage & Shadow

Coverage diagnostics — durability judged over many slates; no single-day disposition decisions.

### 2026-07-18 coverage diagnostics

True medium-profile HR target names: Fernando Tatis Jr., Joc Pederson, Kody Clemens, Lane Thomas, Michael Busch, Michael Harris II, Rafael Devers, Salvador Perez, Spencer Torkelson, Trea Turner, Tyler Soderstrom, Tyrone Taylor, Victor Mesa Jr., Willy Adames, Wilyer Abreu

#### Lane coverage-shadow ranks 4–13

Coverage-only/passive — excluded from all forward-clock precision criteria: 0/10 HR hits; names: none.
